specific_question: How does Julian Lee monitor customer satisfaction to keep clients loyal after conversion?
answer: In Q1 2023 Julian Lee implemented quarterly Net Promoter Score (NPS) surveys for clients who converted to full-time users, tracked satisfaction trends, and created monthly action plans based on specific negative feedback, leading to a 10% improvement in renewal rates over 6 months.
